title: Orbit Bridge - REKT
relevance_summary: Bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a bridge contract to external addresses within a short timeframe.
prevention.trigger: Bridged asset transfer -> External address transfer in quick succession

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends funds from a bridge contract to external addresses within a short timeframe.
summary: Orbit Bridge lost $81.5M to a compromised multisig attack, likely involving signature bypass. A guard could have detected and blocked suspicious transfers from the bridge contract.
